data.name: University Days - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
🎓 Welcome to University

A college experience you'll never forget. Unless someone makes sure you do.

Step into the chaotic life of a new university student navigating lust, secrets, and power plays at one of the most twisted institutions you’ve ever enrolled in.

You're not just here to study.

You're here to survive emotionally charged roommates, manipulative teachers, seductive strangers, and a growing conspiracy led by someone only known as X — a puppet master who seems to know everything about you.

As the term progresses, you'll make choices that shape your relationships — and determine who you can trust.

Because at this university, everyone is watching… and some of them want to own you.

🔑 Key Features

🍑 Explicit Adult Encounters

Story-rich, fully illustrated NSFW scenes that blend tension, humor, and desire.

🕵️ Unfolding Mystery

A hidden puppet master is pulling the strings. As secrets unravel, the line between fantasy and danger begins to blur.

🎭 Cinematic Storytelling

Over 5000+ renders and 100+ animations deliver a high-quality, immersive experience from start to finish.

🖼️ Extensive Image Gallery

Relive your favorite moments, poses, and scenes with over 100 unlockable images in the gallery system.

🎁 Bonus Scenes

Enjoy 12 bonus scenes available as DLC - optional content beyond the main storyline.

🧩 Multi-Layered Characters

Each character has their own motivations, secrets, and desires. Peel back the layers… or get lost in them.

data.short_description: Step into the shoes of a Student at an all-but-ordinary University, where there seems to never be a dull day with hot women around every corner. Just so happens that you could just be the most wanted guy at this University... Who will you fall for?.. And who will fall for you?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 義大利文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 +
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHZ Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9 Compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
